settings.title: We Now Offer Same-Day Leak Callouts
settings.excerpt: A second van means we can reach most leaks within the working day rather than booking you in for next week.
settings.body:
A leak does not wait politely for an appointment, so neither should we. From this month Pipeworks runs a second van dedicated to same-day callouts.

If you ring before noon with an active leak, we aim to be at your door the same afternoon. Burst pipes, failing valves, and overflowing cisterns all count.

The early slots fill fast, so call as soon as you spot trouble rather than waiting to see if it stops on its own. It rarely does.

Routine jobs like new taps and bathroom fits still book in the normal way, and that wait has actually shortened now the urgent work has its own van.
